# verifyTotp

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for verifyTotp

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useVerifyTotpMutation(); mutate({ input: { totpValue: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useVerifyTotpMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useVerifyTotpMutation();
mutate({ input: { totpValue: '<String>' } });
```
